summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical is selected. Hydrated open PRs with no clear close/merge path are kept independently; PRs with active author/maintainer follow-up or missing hydration are escalated only for that item. No security-sensitive item was detected in the preflight artifact.
